task_completion.description: Create a new ground station named 'Wallops' with the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GPredict 'Add Ground Station' or 'Edit Ground Station' dialog showing Name: 'Wallops', Latitude: 37.9402 (or 37.9402 N), Longitude: -75.4664 (or 75.4664 W), and Altitude: 12.

task_completion.description: Update the transponder files for NOAA 15, 18, and 19 with their APT downlink frequencies in Hz and mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing modifications to the files '25338.trsp', '28654.trsp', and '33591.trsp'. The files must show 'DOWN_LOW' set to 137620000, 137912500, and 137100000 respectively, and 'MODE=APT'.

task_completion.description: Create a new module named 'NOAA_APT' containing the three NOAA satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GPredict module configuration dialog showing the module name 'NOAA_APT' with NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), and NOAA 19 (33591) in the list of selected satellites.

task_completion.description: Configure the NOAA_APT module to show 3 ground tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict module configuration dialog (under the Map or Properties tab) showing the 'Ground Track' count setting changed to 3.

task_completion.description: The main GPredict UI displays the configured NOAA_APT module and Wallops ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main GPredict window is visible, displaying a tab or window named 'NOAA_APT', with 'Wallops' listed as the active ground station, and the NOAA satellites visible on the map.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict GUI for module and ground station setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GPredict graphical user interface being actively used and clicked through, not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the transponder files were edited in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor must show the file path as '~/.config/Gpredict/trsp/' or '/home/ga/.config/Gpredict/trsp/' when editing the .trsp files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text files or terminal outputs that simply list the task requirements (e.g., 'Task complete: Wallops created') without the corresponding software configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338) frequency: 137620000 Hz. NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654) frequency: 137912500 Hz. NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591) frequency: 137100000 Hz. Transponder Mode: APT. Wallops Ground Station: Latitude 37.9402 N, Longitude 75.4664 W (or -75.4664), Altitude 12m. Expected ground track count: 3.
